title: System2 Overlay Manifest
description: Canonical manifest structure for System2 overlay authors. The composer implements a limited stdlib-only validator that checks required fields, value types, enum constraints, and pattern constraints against this structure. Full JSON Schema draft compliance is not required and is not promised.

name.description: Unique identifier for the overlay. Must be kebab-case.

description.description: One-line summary of what the overlay provides.

schema_version.description: Version of the overlay manifest schema this manifest conforms to. The composer validates that it supports this version before proceeding.

compatibility.description: Declares inter-overlay compatibility information used by the composer for conflict detection and semantic tension warnings.

known_conflicts.description: Overlay names that structurally conflict with this overlay. The composer refuses to compose when a listed overlay is present.

tested_with.description: Overlay names that have been tested for correct co-composition with this overlay.

review_when_combined_with_tags.description: Tag strings. When another overlay shares one of these tags, the composer emits a semantic tension warning.

contributions.description: Typed contribution declarations organized by target surface. All contribution types are additive; no type expresses deletion, replacement, or override of base System2 content.

principles.description: Operating principles appended to the orchestrator's principles section. Inlined in composed CLAUDE.md by default.

content_file.description: Relative path to a markdown file within the overlay directory. Must not be absolute or contain "..".

after.description: ID of another principle to order after within this scope. null or omitted means no ordering constraint.

gates.description: Gate consultation contributions keyed by gate number ("1" through "5").

consultation.description: Consultation steps added to this gate.

content_file.description: Relative path to a markdown file within the overlay directory.

phase.description: When this consultation runs relative to the gate's primary delegation.

after.description: ID of another consultation in this gate to order after.

advisory_sources.description: Advisory sources the orchestrator should consult when delegating. Names and descriptions are inlined in composed CLAUDE.md.

name.description: Human-readable label for this advisory source.

resolution.description: How the orchestrator obtains findings from this source.

agents.description: Contributions targeting pipeline agents, keyed by agent name. Valid agent names: code-reviewer, design-architect, docs-release, eval-engineer, executor, mcp-toolsmith, postmortem-scribe, repo-governor, requirements-engineer, security-sentinel, spec-coordinator, task-planner, test-engineer.

prompt_sections.description: Prompt section contributions keyed by anchor name. Valid anchor names vary per agent; see anchor-map.json for the full mapping. In Phase 1, prompt sections flow through composed CLAUDE.md delegation instructions (summary inline, full text as file pointer). Phase 2 may materialize them into agent system prompts.

content_file.description: Relative path to a markdown file within the overlay directory.

after.description: ID of another contribution at this anchor to order after.

inline.description: Controls whether full content is inlined in composed CLAUDE.md (true) or referenced as a file pointer (false).

summary.description: Concise behavioral directive visible in composed CLAUDE.md. Required when inline is false (the default). The orchestrator sees this summary and reads the full content file when delegating.

tools.description: Tools to add to this agent's tool list. Deferred in Phase 1: declared contributions are validated but not registered in agent frontmatter until Phase 3.

tool_name.description: The tool to add to the agent's tool list.

justification.description: Why this agent needs this tool.

hooks.description: Hooks to add to this agent's hook configuration. Deferred in Phase 1: declared hooks are security-validated at composition time but not registered in agent frontmatter until Phase 3. Hook scripts must use Python 3.8+ stdlib only.

matcher.description: Regex matching tool names. Required for PreToolUse and PostToolUse events.

command.description: The hook command to execute. Path must be relative to the overlay directory.

spec.description: Contributions targeting spec artifacts, keyed by artifact name.

required_sections.description: Sections that must appear in this spec artifact when the overlay is active.

section_heading.description: The heading to require in the spec artifact.

auxiliary_agents.description: Auxiliary agents contributed by this overlay. These are NOT pipeline agents: they do not participate in the 13-agent pipeline, do not appear in the delegation map or gate checklist, and cannot spawn subagents. The orchestrator may optionally delegate to them.

name.description: Agent name. Must be kebab-case and must not collide with any pipeline agent name.

pipeline.description: Must be false. Auxiliary agents are not pipeline agents.

delegation_policy.description: How the orchestrator should treat this agent for delegation.

agent_file.description: Relative path to the agent's .md definition file within the overlay directory. Must follow the same format as pipeline agent files (markdown with YAML frontmatter).

mcp_servers.description: MCP server suggestions. The composer includes these in composed CLAUDE.md for the user to configure in .mcp.json.

config.description: MCP server configuration suitable for .mcp.json (e.g., type, command, args).

required_by.description: Contribution IDs from this overlay that depend on this MCP server.

permissions.description: Permission suggestions. The composer includes these in composed CLAUDE.md for the user to add to .claude/settings.json.

required_by.description: Contribution IDs from this overlay that depend on this permission.
